doc: Open hi-hat voice (ADR-0032): the nested hat-voice (highpassed noise tick) with a long decay/release baked in, so the same metallic noise source rings out into a sizzling open hat instead of a short closed tick. Hosted by a 1-voice voicer; only `gate` is drivable. interface: gate in, audio/active out.

nodes.doc: The closed hat-voice, opened up: longer decay/release and a slightly lower highpass so it sizzles instead of ticking.
